purpose: Standard sidecar artifact protocol for exposing a safe, public reasoning narrative across arbitrarily deep workflow composition without exposing hidden chain-of-thought, raw private notes, or raw tool payloads.
composition_rules: Every workflow may emit one local public_reasoning_trace_v1 sidecar artifact describing only its own work.
Composite workflows preserve direct child public trace refs and emit one public_reasoning_rollup_v1 summarizing local work plus direct child traces.
Parents summarize only their direct children; recursive trace trees are followed by refs, not inlined blobs.
Top-level workflows own chat presentation and may render a short rollup, an expanded trace tree, or a blocker-focused explanation.
Primitive workflows never decide final chat UX; they emit structured trace data for parents to render.
Missing child traces must be represented as explicit missing_trace_refs rather than silently dropped.

forbidden: unredacted file contents unless already user-visible
